mapper.select: -- 场景1：当前用户作为 user_id，好友是 link_user_id SELECT u.icon, ul.link_user_id AS linkId, u.nick_name AS nickName, ul.is_frequent, ul.remark, ul.is_delete FROM user_link ul INNER JOIN user u ON ul.link_user_id = u.id WHERE ul.user_id = #{userID} AND ul.is_delete = 0 -- 过滤已删除的好友 UNION -- 场景2：当前用户作为 link_user_id，好友是 user_id SELECT u.icon, ul.user_id AS linkId, -- 此时好友ID是 user_id u.nick_name AS nickName, ul.is_frequent, ul.remark, ul.is_delete FROM user_link ul INNER JOIN user u ON ul.user_id = u.id -- 关联好友的 user 信息 WHERE ul.link_user_id = #{userID} AND ul.is_delete = 0;
mapper.insert: insert user_link(link_user_id, user_id, remark,is_frequent) values (#{linkID},#{userID},#{remark},#{isFrequent}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_delete = 0, remark = VALUES(remark), is_frequent = VALUES(is_frequent)
mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from user_link where( (user_id = #{userID} and link_user_id = #{linkID}) or (user_id = #{linkID} and link_user_id = #{userID})) and is_delete = 0 )
